title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Momonosuke, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, King as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A shocking scene unfolds before them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wahaha. I can't blame you for being surprised!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was flung into the future by TOKI's power.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll explain the details later. It's a long story!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We sadly don't have time to celebrate our reunion now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We failed to defeat Kaido back then, but now we have another chance to face him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's right here in front of our eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Kinemon, remember what TOKI- SAMA told us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "It's impossible to return to the past!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: toki-sama's powers can only send a person forward in time,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But often-sama definitely died that day!! That's a fact!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So how could he possibly be here in the future?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How out- Rageous! Who's behind this!?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 38 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
